doc: The same self-playing sequence as sequence.json, but the Voicer resolves each step degree through a tonal context set to C natural minor — so the identical degree pattern (0..7) re-spells into the minor scale with no edit to the line. Each step plays on a hosted `scale-voice` sub-patch. Change the key live with /harmony/root (MIDI), or reshape the scale with /harmony/s0../harmony/s6 (step offsets) and /harmony/degrees; both apply sample-accurately. Send a chord with /harmony/set [tag, d0, d1, ...] (tag 1 = scale-relative, 2 = absolute, 0 = clear).

nodes.doc: Degrees -> Hz via the tonal context, played on hosted scale-voice sub-patches.
